title: Approved Change — ECR-221: Motor and ESC replacement (P-1031/P-1032 → P-1041/P-1042)
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-318. Implements ECR-221.
Approved by: Dr. Rhea Voss, 2024-04-22.

This ECN formally authorises the implementation of ECR-221 (motor and ESC replacement). Effective from approval date.

Authorised changes:
1. P-1031 (BLDC Motor v1): Obsoleted. Remove from active BOM. Retain in archive for reference.
2. P-1032 (ESC 60A Original): Obsoleted. Remove from active BOM.
3. P-1041 (BLDC Motor v2 Enhanced, TorqueDrive 4014 420KV): Added to BOM. 4 off required per airframe.
4. P-1042 (ESC 80A Enhanced, ControlAir copper heatsink): Added to BOM. 4 off required per airframe.
5. P-1051 (ESC Heatsink Enhanced): Added to BOM. 4 off required per airframe.
6. DOC-445 (Motor Qualification Test Report): Created per this ECN, documents P-1041/P-1042 thermal qualification at 40°C ambient.
7. DRW-539 (Motor v2 Installation): Updated for P-1041 and P-1042 dimensions.
8. SRC-026 (motor_controller.c): KV-rating constants updated for 420KV. Committed 2024-05-10.
